title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called The Central Boards of Revenue Act, 1963. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st January, 1964, vide notification No. S.O. 3606, dated 30th December 1963, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part II, sec. 3 (ii).
